title: AI Auto-Generate
subtitle: Create flashcards automatically with AI — just enter a topic

provider.notice: AI generation uses your own API key for each provider. Add or manage keys in Settings.

content.topicPlaceholder: e.g., JLPT N3 Japanese vocabulary, Korean grammar...
content.imageHint: Pick a photo — AI turns it into cards.

doneStep.title: Cards Created!
doneStep.subtitle: Your AI-generated flashcards are ready to study.

alert.configureProvider: Please configure an AI provider in Settings first.
alert.selectImageError: That image is too large or couldn't be read. Try a smaller photo.
alert.permissionDenied: Photo access is needed to upload an image.
alert.deckNoTemplate: This deck has no card template yet — open it and add a card once to set one up.

errors.insufficientCredits: You've used today's free AI cards and have no credits left. Top up to keep generating.
errors.invalidImage: Couldn't read that image. Please try a smaller or clearer photo.
errors.quotaExceeded: You've reached today's free AI generation limit. Please try again tomorrow.
errors.rateLimited: Rate limited. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.invalidResponse: AI returned an invalid response. Please try again.
errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.serverError: AI generation is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
errors.cardLimitReached: You’ve reached your card limit. Delete cards or subscribe to save more.
